data.body: Story 5967 validation complete. Held-out oracle: initial 46/46 RED for missing behavior; implementer saw only happy-path test; restored oracle 46/46 GREEN; defect-seeded removal of max(..., 0.80) made execution-floor oracle RED. Compatibility remediation: 51 targeted tests green; xdist diagnostic 6878 passed/28 skipped; final acceptance evidence added for lifecycle signing, decide/recovery routing, docs, snapshot pass-through, and compaction. Final frozen-tree gates: make check PASS; make test 6883 passed, 28 skipped, 112 deselected; diff check clean; module sizes signing.py=798, attest.py=800, generation.py=172. Five-axis review APPROVE: no correctness, architecture, security, performance, or dead-code blocker.
